title: Simple Warn System
description: Warn players on your Minecraft Server
body:
Warn System is a simple moderation plugin that allows staff members to manage player behavior efficiently. It enables moderators to add and remove warnings, view all warnings assigned to a player, and check a player’s current warning count.

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7085cf7894671b919333702a4c43ab609acf048e.png)

Commands:

/warn add <player> <reason>

/warn remove <player> <id>

/warn list

/warn check <player>
